Under xdist, a prior test leaves the loop policy with `_set_called=True, _loop=None`, so it raised \"no current event loop\" for these sync tests (they passed in isolation). Switched to `asyncio.run()`. Keys are labels; values are compiled regexes.\n+SECRET_PATTERNS: dict[str, str] = {\n+    \"anthropic_key\": r\"sk-ant-api\\d{2}-[A-Za-z0-9_\\-]{20,}\",\n+    \"openai_key\": r\"\\bsk-[A-Za-z0-9]{32,}\\b\",\n+    \"openai_proj_key\": r\"\\bsk-proj-[A-Za-z0-9_\\-]{20,}\",\n+    \"github_pat\": r\"\\bghp_[A-Za-z0-9]{36}\\b\",\n+    \"github_fine_pat\": r\"\\bgithub_pat_[A-Za-z0-9_]{60,}\",\n+    \"slack_token\": r\"\\bxox[baprs]-[A-Za-z0-9\\-]{10,}\",\n+    \"aws_access_key\": r\"\\bAKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}\\b\",\n+    \"google_api_key\": \"private_key_block\": r\"-----BEGIN (?:RSA |EC |OPENSSH |DSA |PGP )?PRIVATE KEY-----\",\n+    \"smtp_password_assign\": r\"(?i)smtp[_-]?pass(?:word)?\\s*[:=]\\s*['\\\"][^'\\\"]{6,}['\\\"]\",\n+    \"railway_token_assign\": r\"(?i)railway[_-]?token\\s*[:=]\\s*['\\\"][^'\\\"]{12,}['\\\"]\",\n+    \"generic_secret_assign\": r\"(?i)(?:api[_-]?key|secret|access[_-]?token|password)\\s*[:=]\\s*['\\\"][A-Za-z0-9+/=_\\-]{20,}['\\\"]\",\n+}\n+\n+# Files / paths whose secrets are intentional placeholders.\n+ALLOW_SUBSTR = (\".example\", \".template\", \".sample\", \"/tests/\", \"test_\", \".secrets.baseline\", \".gitleaks\")\n+\n+# Placeholder values that are not real secrets.\n+PLACEHOLDER_RE = re.compile(\n+    r\"(?i)(your[_-]?|example|placeholder|change[_-]?me|dummy|xxxx|<[^>]+>|\\b(?:foo|bar|test)\\b|\\.\\.\\.|redacted)\"\n+)\n+\n+# What we scan: the launch-control surface we introduced.\n+SCAN_GLOBS = (\n+    \"launch_os/**/*.py\",\n+    \"scripts/commercial_*.py\",\n+    \"scripts/final_*.py\",\n+    \"scripts/media_social_*.py\",\n+    \"scripts/site_launch_*.py\",\n+    \"scripts/api_commercial_*.py\",\n+    \"config/*.json\",\n+    \"docs/launch-control/**/*.md\",\n+    \"docs/commercial-launch/**/*.md\",\n+    \"docs/media-social-os/**/*.md\",\n+    \"docs/site-launch/**/*.md\",\n+    \".github/workflows/final-launch-control.yml\",\n+    \".github/workflows/commercial-draft-factory.yml\",\n+    \".github/workflows/media-social-calendar.yml\",\n+    \".github/workflows/site-commercial-verify.yml\",\n+)\n+\n+\n+def _iter_files():\n+    seen = set()\n+    for g in SCAN_GLOBS:\n+        for p in paths.REPO_ROOT.glob(g):\n+            if p.is_file() and p not in seen:\n+                seen.add(p)\n+                yield p\n+\n+\n+def _is_allowlisted(path: Path) -> bool:\n+    s = path.as_posix()\n+    return any(a in s for a in ALLOW_SUBSTR)\n+\n+\n+def scan() -> dict:\n+    findings: list[dict] = []\n+    files_scanned = 0\n+    for path in _iter_files():\n+        files_scanned += 1\n+        allow = _is_allowlisted(path)\n+        try:\n+            text = path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\", errors=\"ignore\")\n+        except OSError:\n+            continue\n+        for label, pat in SECRET_PATTERNS.items():\n+            for m in re.finditer(pat, text):\n+                snippet = m.group(0)\n+                # Skip obvious placeholders / allowlisted files.\n+                if allow or PLACEHOLDER_RE.search(snippet):\n+                    continue\n+                line_no = text[: m.start()].count(\"\\n\") + 1\n+                findings.append(\n+                    {\n+                        \"file\": paths.rel(path),\n+                        \"line\": line_no,\n+                        \"type\": label,\n+                        \"match_preview\": snippet[:12] + \"…\",\n+                    }\n+                )\n+    clean = len(findings) == 0\n+    return {\n+        \"clean\": clean,\n+        \"files_scanned\": files_scanned,\n+        \"findings_count\": len(findings),\n+        \"findings\": findings,\n+        \"scanned_globs\": list(SCAN_GLOBS),\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def main() -> int:\n+    paths.ensure_dirs()\n+    result = scan()\n+    out = paths.FINAL_CONTROL_OUT / \"secret_risk_scan.json\"\n+    out.write_text(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding=\"utf-8\")",

The system never sends externally.**\n\nThis is built as a new, isolated namespace (`config/commercial_*`, `scripts/commercial_*`, `docs/commercial-launch/`, `docs/media-social-os/`) and does **not** modify the existing production commercial systems, API, or the Next.js web build.\n\n## Includes\n\n- **First 5 verticals** — facilities management, contracting & project controls, real estate ops, legal & professional services (privacy-first), consulting/training/B2B — each a deep playbook in `docs/commercial-launch/verticals/`.\n- **400+ daily draft factory** — `scripts/commercial_generate_400_drafts.py` (175 cold email / 100 follow-up / 75 LinkedIn manual / 50 website-form), every draft approval-gated and scored (quality / compliance / fit / priority).\n- **Founder Review Queue** — `founder_review.{md,csv}`, `top_50_priority.md`, rejected/needs-research splits, daily metrics, batch manifest → `outputs/commercial_launch/<date>/` (git-ignored; regenerated).\n- **Safety audit** — `scripts/commercial_safety_audit.py` scans for real send-code and bad flag states and verifies the batch; **PASS**.\n- **Quality + compliance gates** — banned-phrase, opt-out, single-offer, misleading-subject, and privacy-first (legal) enforcement.\n- **SAR offer ladder** + pricing, sales messaging (AR/EN), objections, discovery, proposal/one-pager, delivery OS, metrics dashboard, external go-live requirements, lead-intake/CRM schema.\n- **Media & Social OS** — 30-day bilingual content calendar (plan only), platform OS docs, press kit, ads **planning** only; `auto_publish=false` everywhere.\n- **3 GitHub Actions** — `commercial-draft-factory`, `media-social-calendar`, `site-commercial-verify`; all `permissions: contents: read`, no secrets, artifact-only, no deploy.\n- **README** — corrected clone URL to `Dealix-sa/dealix` and added a Commercial Launch OS section.\n\n## Safety\n\n- No external sending. No SMTP, WhatsApp outbound, LinkedIn automation, or website auto-submit anywhere — enforced by `commercial_safety_audit.py` and `test_commercial_no_external_send.py`.\n- No secrets, no API keys, no browser automation, no scraping. Seed leads are synthetic with no personal contact fields.\n- Every draft: `send_allowed=false`, `external_send_blocked=true`, `requires_founder_approval=true`, `no_auto_send=true`.\n\n## Tests run (local)\n\n- `pytest` over the 10 new files → **42 passed**.\n- `python scripts/commercial_generate_400_drafts.py --target 400` → 400 drafts, 378 into review, 22 compliance-rejected, 0 quality-rejected.\n- `python scripts/commercial_safety_audit.py` → **PASS** (400 checked).\n- `python scripts/commercial_launch_readiness.py` → **READY**.\n- `make env-check` → ✅ ; `make api-contract-check` → ✅.\n- `make security-smoke` → fails **only on pre-existing** fixtures/docs (`tests/test_*`, `docs/ops/*`); **none of the new files are flagged**.\n\n## Scope notes (honest)\n\n- The marketing site (`apps/web`) already ships SEO (robots/sitemap/manifest/JSON-LD/OG, bilingual). To avoid risking the production build, the site was **not rewritten**; a `site-commercial-verify` workflow hard-gates commercial readiness + SEO presence and runs the web build as a non-blocking informational job. See `docs/site-launch/99_SITE_LAUNCH_REPORT.md`.\n- No new send endpoints were added to the API.\n\n## Go / No-Go\n\n**GO:** site launch (existing site), draft generation, founder review, media planning, paid diagnostics, discovery calls, proposals.\n\n**NO-GO:** automated sending, cold WhatsApp, LinkedIn automation, bulk email, website auto-submit, paid ads without tracking/legal review, processing sensitive data before agreement.\n\nhttps://claude.ai/code/session_01JdKfpPmB2gQBkeAa7xXPw9\n\n---\n_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01JdKfpPmB2gQBkeAa7xXPw9)_",

Missing file → empty list (case 1).\"\"\"\n+    if path is None:\n+        path = REPO_ROOT / load_config(\"launch\")[\"seed_leads_path\"]\n+    path = Path(path)\n+    leads: list[dict[str, Any]] =       continue\n+            leads.append(json.loads(line))\n+    return leads\n+\n+\n+def today_str(d: _date | None = None) -> str:\n+    return (d or _date.today()).isoformat()\n+\n+\n+def output_dir_for(date_str: str) -> Path:\n+    return OUTPUT_ROOT / date_str\n+\n+\n+# ── Helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+def _word_count(*parts: str) -> int:\n+    return len([w for w in re.split(r\"\\s+\", \" \".join(parts).strip()) if w])\n+\n+\n+def _question_count(text: str) -> int:\n+    return text.count(\"?\") + text.count(\"؟\")\n+\n+\n+def _vertical_by_id(configs: dict, vid: str) -> dict:\n+    for v in configs[\"verticals\"][\"verticals\"]:\n+        if v[\"id\"] == vid:\n+            return v\n+    return   return o\n+    return configs[\"offers\"][\"ladder\"][0]\n+\n+\n+# ── Message composition (compliant by construction) ────────────────────────\n+def _compose(channel: str, language: str, ctx: dict) offer = ctx[\"offer_name\"]\n+    deliverable = ctx[\"deliverable\"]\n+\n+    if language == \"ar\":\n+        approval = \"تحت إشرافكم الكامل — الذكاء يقترح ويصيغ، وأنتم من يقرر، وبياناتكم تبقى                 f\"{vname} تعالج {pain}، {approval}. بدأنا مع جهات مشابهة عبر {offer}.\"\n+                ),\n+                \"cta\": \"هل أشارك نبذة قصيرة عن طريقة العمل\",\n+                \"opt_out\": \"\",\n+            }\n+        # website_form\n+        return {\n+            \"subject\": \"\",\n+            \"body\": (\n+                f\"نمثل Dealix، نظام تشغيل تجاري بالذكاء الاصطناعي. نساعد جهات {vname} \"\n+                f\"على معالجة {pain} {approval}، بدءًا بـ{offer}.\"\n+            ),\n+            \"cta\": \"يسعدنا ترتيب مكالمة قصيرة لمراجعة سير عملكم\",\n+            \"opt_out\": \"\",\n+        }\n+\n+    # English\n+    approval = (\n+        \"fully under your control — the AI recommends and drafts, you decide, \"\n+        \"and your data stays with you\"\n+    )\n+    opt_out = \"Reply STOP to opt out of further messages.\"\n+    if channel == \"cold_email\":\n+        return {\n+            \"subject\": f\"{vname}: tackling {pain}\",\n+            \"body\": (\n+                f\"Hi {title} at {company}. We help {vname} teams \"\n+            f\"tackle {pain} {approval}, starting with the {offer}.\"\n+        ),\n+        \"cta\": \"We would welcome a short call to review your workflow\",\n+        \"opt_out\": \"\",\n+    }\n+\n+\n+# ── Scoring + gates ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+def score_quality(draft: dict, configs: dict) -> tuple[int, list[str]]:\n+    rules = configs[\"quality\"]\n+    reasons: list[str] = []\n+    score = 100\n+    text = f\"{draft['subject']} {draft['body']} {draft['cta']}\".lower()\n+    channel = draft[\"channel\"]\n+    sensitive = _vertical_by_id(configs, draft[\"vertical\"]).get(\"sensitive\", False)\n+\n+    # must mention vertical or pain\n+    pain = draft[\"pain_angle\"].lower()\n+    if pain not in draft[\"body\"].lower():\n+        score -= 40\n+        reasons.append(\"missing_pain_or_vertical\")\n+    # single CTA (exactly one question across body+cta)\n+    qn = _question_count(draft[\"body\"]) + _question_count(draft[\"cta\"])\n+    if qn != 1:\n+        score -= 25\n+        reasons.append(\"not_single_cta\")\n+    # opt-out where required\n+    ch_cfg = configs[\"channels\"][\"channels\"][channel]\n+    if ch_cfg.get(\"requires_opt_out\") and not draft[\"opt_out\"].strip():\n+        score -= 25\n+        reasons.append(\"missing_opt_out\")\n+    # human approval language for sensitive verticals\n+    if sensitive:\n+        markers = (\"إشراف\", \"أنتم من يقرر\", \"control\", \"you decide\", \"approval\")\n+        if not any(m.lower() in text for m in markers):\n+            score -= 20\n+            reasons.append(\"sensitive_missing_human_approval\")\n+    # length limit\n+    limit = rules[\"max_words_by_channel\"].get(channel, 180)\n+    if _word_count(draft[\"body\"], draft[\"cta\"]) > limit:\n+        score -= 20\n+        reasons.append(\"overlength\")\n+    # generic agency language\n+    for phrase in rules[\"generic_agency_phrases\"]:\n+        if phrase.lower() in text:\n+            score -= 30\n+            reasons.append(\"generic_agency_language\")\n+            break\n+    # single offer\n+    offer_hits = sum(\n+        1 for o in configs[\"offers\"][\"ladder\"]\n+        if o[\"name_en\"].split(\" — \")[0].lower() in text or o[\"name_ar\"].split(\" — \")[0] in draft[\"body\"]\n+    )\n+    if offer_hits > 1:\n+        score -= 20\n+        reasons.append(\"multiple_offer\")\n+\n+    return max(0, min(100, score)), reasons\n+\n+\n+def score_compliance(draft: dict, configs: dict) -> tuple[int, list[str]]:\n+    cfg = configs[\"compliance\"]\n+    reasons: list[str] = []\n+    score = 100\n+    text = f\"{draft['subject']} {draft['body']} {draft['cta']}\".lower()\n+    channel = draft[\"channel\"]\n+\n+    for phrase in cfg[\"banned_phrases\"]:\n+        if phrase.lower() in text:\n+            score -= 50\n+            reasons.append(\"banned_phrase\")\n+    ch_cfg = configs[\"channels\"][\"channels\"][channel]\n+    if ch_cfg.get(\"requires_opt_out\") and not draft[\"opt_out\"].strip():\n+        score -= 40\n+        reasons.append(\"no_opt_out\")\n+    # sensitive vertical needs privacy-first language\n+    if draft[\"vertical\"] in cfg[\"sensitive_verticals\"]:\n+        markers = cfg[\"privacy_first_markers_en\"] + cfg[\"privacy_first_markers_ar\"]\n+        if not any(m.lower() in text or m in draft[\"body\"] for m in markers):\n+            score -= 30\n+            reasons.append(\"sensitive_no_privacy_language\")\n+    # multiple CTA\n+    qn = _question_count(draft[\"body\"]) + _question_count(draft[\"cta\"])\n+    if qn > 1:\n+        score -= 25\n+        reasons.append(\"multiple_cta\")\n+    # whatsapp needs opt-in (only if a whatsapp draft is ever produced)\n+    if channel == \"whatsapp\" and draft.get(\"research_required\"):\n+        score -= 30\n+        reasons.append(\"whatsapp_no_optin\")\n+\n+    return max(0, min(100, score)), reasons\n+\n+\n+def quality_gate(draft: dict, configs: dict) -> tuple[bool, int, list[str]]:\n+    score, reasons = score_quality(draft, configs)\n+    passed = score >= configs[\"quality\"][\"min_quality_score\"] and not reasons\n+    return passed, score, reasons\n+\n+\n+def compliance_gate(draft: dict, configs: dict) -> tuple[bool, int, list[str]]:\n+    score, reasons = score_compliance(draft, configs)\n+    passed = score >= configs[\"compliance\"][\"min_compliance_score\"] and not reasons\n+    return passed, score, reasons\n+\n+\n+def finalize_draft(draft: dict, configs: dict) -> dict:\n+    \"\"\"Score, gate, set status / risk / notes, and lock safety flags.\"\"\"\n+    q_pass, q_score, q_reasons = quality_gate(draft, configs)\n+    c_pass, c_score, c_reasons = compliance_gate(draft, configs)\n+    draft[\"quality_score\"] = q_score\n+    draft[\"compliance_score\"] = c_score\n+\n+    sensitive = _vertical_by_id(configs, draft[\"vertical\"]).get(\"sensitive\", False)\n+\n+    if not c_pass:\n+        draft[\"status\"] = \"rejected_compliance\"\n+        draft[\"rejection_reason\"] = \";\".join(c_reasons) or \"compliance_below_threshold\"\n+        draft[\"risk_level\"] = \"high\"\n+    elif not q_pass:\n+        draft[\"status\"] = \"rejected_quality\"\n+        draft[\"rejection_reason\"] = \";\".join(q_reasons) or \"quality_below_threshold\"\n+        draft[\"risk_level\"] = \"high\"\n+    elif draft[\"research_required\"]:\n+        draft[\"status\"] = \"needs_research\"\n+        draft[\"rejection_reason\"] = \"\"\n+        draft[\"risk_level\"] = \"medium\"\n+    elif draft.get(\"_consent\") == \"opt_in\" and q_score >= 90 and c_score >= 90:\n+        draft[\"status\"] = \"ready_for_manual_copy\"\n+        draft[\"rejection_reason\"] = \"\"\n+        draft[\"risk_level\"] = \"medium\" if sensitive else \"low\"\n+    else:\n+        draft[\"status\"] = \"founder_review\"\n+        draft[\"rejection_reason\"] = \"\"\n+        draft[\"risk_level\"] = \"medium\" if sensitive else \"low\"\n+\n+    # Founder notes\n+    notes = []\n+    if draft[\"research_required\"]:\n+        notes.append(\"Verify company + public contact before any manual send.\")\n+    if sensitive:\n+        notes.append(\"Sensitive sector: keep privacy-first, human-in-the-loop language.\")\n+    if draft[\"status\"].startswith(\"rejected\"):\n+        notes.append(\"Rejected by gate — do not send; fix or archive.\")\n+    if draft[\"status\"] == \"ready_for_manual_copy\":\n+        notes.append(\"Founder approval still required before any manual copy/send.\")\n+    draft[\"founder_notes\"] = \" \".join(notes) or \"Founder review required.\"\n+\n+    draft.pop(\"_consent\", None)\n+    draft.update(SAFETY_FLAGS)\n+    return draft\n+\n+\n+# ── Draft building ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+def _distribution_for(target: int, configs: dict) -> dict[str, int]:\n+    base = configs[\"distribution\"][\"distribution\"]\n+    base_total = sum(base.values())\n+    if target == base_total:\n+        return dict(base)\n+    counts: dict[str, int] = {}\n+    for ch, n in base.items():\n+        counts[ch] = round(n * target / base_total)\n+    diff = target - sum(counts.values())\n+    counts[\"cold_email\"] += diff  # absorb rounding remainder\n+    return counts\n+\n+\n+def _placeholder_lead(idx: int, vertical_id: str, configs: dict) -> dict:\n+    v = _vertical_by_id(configs, vertical_id)\n+    return {\n+        \"lead_id\": f\"PH-{idx:05d}\",\n+        \"company_name\": f\"[Prospect] {v['name_en']} #{idx:03d}\",\n+        \"country\": \"SA\",\n+        \"city\": \"Riyadh\",\n+        \"vertical_hint\": vertical_id,\n+        \"language_hint\": \"ar\" if idx % 20 < 11 else \"en\",\n+ Proves the system *flows*, stage by stage, and writes a PASS/FAIL\n+report to ``reports/verification/e2e_dry_run_latest.md``.\n+\n+Stages:\n+    1. Target\n+    2. Outreach Approval (founder approval required — never auto-sent)\n+    3. Diagnostic\n+    4. Offer\n+    5. Paid Sprint Simulation (SIMULATED status only — no real payment)\n+    6. Customer Workspace\n+    7. Proof Pack (skeleton — no fake result presented as real)\n+    8. Upsell\n+    9. Founder Daily Command\n+    + Governance gate (No External Action Without Approval)\n+\n+Hard rules enforced:\n+    - no real external sending\n+    - no fake proof presented as real\n+    - no guaranteed revenue\n+    - no customer name publishing\n+    - no WhatsApp automation\n+    - all external actions remain approval-required\n+\n+Usage:\n+    python scripts/run_dealix_e2e_dry_run.py\n+\n+Terminal markers:\n+    E2E_DRY_RUN_VERDICT=<verdict>\n+    DEALIX_E2E_DRY_RUN_OK=true|false\n+\"\"\"\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import csv\n+import sys\n+from dataclasses import dataclass, field\n+from datetime import date\n+from pathlib import Path\n+\n+REPO = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]\n+if str(REPO) not in sys.path:\n+    sys.path.insert(0, str(REPO))\n+\n+from scripts.create_customer_workspace import (  # noqa: E402\n+    COMMAND_SPRINT_FILES,\n+    create_workspace,\n+)\n+\n+DRY_RUN_CLIENT = \"dry-run-client\"\n+\n+\n+@dataclass\n+class Stage:\n+    key: str\n+    name: str\n+    core: bool\n+    passed: bool = False\n+    notes: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)\n+\n+    def fail(self, msg: str) -> None:\n+        self.passed = False\n+        self.notes.append(msg)\n+\n+    def ok(self, msg: str) -> None:\n+        self.passed = True\n+        self.notes.append(msg)\n+\n+\n+def _read(rel: str) -> str:\n+    fp = REPO / rel\n+    return fp.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\", errors=\"ignore\") if fp.is_file() else \"\"\n+\n+\n+def stage_target() -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"target\", \"Target\", core=True)\n+    fp = REPO / \"data/outreach/first_30_targets.csv\"\n+    if not fp.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"data/outreach/first_30_targets.csv missing\")\n+        return s\n+    rows = list(csv.DictReader(fp.open(encoding=\"utf-8\", newline=\"\")))\n+    if not rows:\n+        s.fail(\"targets file has no rows\")\n+        return s\n+    s.ok(f\"target list present ({len(rows)} seed rows); simulated target = '{DRY_RUN_CLIENT}'\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def stage_outreach_approval() -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"outreach\", \"Outreach Approval\", core=True)\n+    fp = REPO / \"data/outreach/approval_queue.csv\"\n+    if not fp.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"data/outreach/approval_queue.csv missing\")\n+        return s\n+    rows = list(csv.DictReader(fp.open(encoding=\"utf-8\", newline=\"\")))\n+    # Approval gate is real only if nothing is auto-approved/sent.\n+    sent = [r for r in rows if (r.get(\"founder_decision\") or \"\").strip().lower() in {\"sent\", \"auto\", \"auto-approved\", \"approved-auto\"}]\n+    if sent:\n+        s.fail(f\"{len(sent)} row(s) marked auto-sent/auto-approved — violates approval gate\")\n+        return s\n+    pending = [r for r in rows if (r.get(\"founder_decision\") or \"\").strip().lower() == \"pending\"]\n+    s.ok(f\"approval queue present; {len(pending)} draft(s) pending founder approval; none auto-sent\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def stage_diagnostic(ws: Path) -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"diagnostic\", \"Diagnostic\", core=True)\n+    f = ws / \"02_diagnostic_summary.md\"\n+    script = REPO / \"scripts/dealix_diagnostic.py\"\n+    if not f.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"02_diagnostic_summary.md missing from workspace\")\n+        return s\n+    if not script.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"scripts/dealix_diagnostic.py missing\")\n+        return s\n+    s.ok(\"diagnostic record present in workspace; diagnostic script available\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def stage_offer(ws: Path) -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"offer\", \"Offer\", core=True)\n+    scope = ws / \"03_command_sprint_scope.md\"\n+    offer_doc = REPO / \"docs/commercial/sales/P1_REVENUE_INTELLIGENCE_SPRINT_OFFER_AR.md\"\n+    if not scope.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"03_command_sprint_scope.md missing from workspace\")\n+        return s\n+    if not offer_doc.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"Command Sprint offer doc missing\")\n+        return s\n+    s.ok(\"Command Sprint scope present in workspace; offer doc available\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def stage_paid_sim() -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"paid\", \"Paid Sprint Simulation\", core=False)\n+    # In-memory simulated payment — explicitly NOT a real charge.\n+    simulated_status = \"SIMULATED-PAID (no real payment link, no charge)\"\n+    s.ok(f\"payment status simulated only: {simulated_status}\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def stage_workspace(ws: Path) -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"workspace\", \"Customer Workspace\", core=True)\n+    missing = [f for f in COMMAND_SPRINT_FILES if not (ws / f).is_file()]\n+    if missing:\n+        s.fail(f\"missing workspace files: {', '.join(missing)}\")\n+        return s\n+    s.ok(f\"all {len(COMMAND_SPRINT_FILES)} Command Sprint files present in customers/{DRY_RUN_CLIENT}/\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def stage_proof_pack(ws: Path) -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"proof\", \"Proof Pack\", core=True)\n+    f = ws / \"10_proof_pack.md\"\n+    if not f.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"10_proof_pack.md missing\")\n+        return s\n+    text = f.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\", errors=\"ignore\")\n+    # Guard: a skeleton must NOT present any verified/achieved result.\n+    if \"✅\" in text and \"Verified\" in text:\n+        s.fail(\"proof pack appears to present a verified result in a dry run (fake proof risk)\")\n+        return s\n+    if \"Skeleton\" not in text and \"skeleton\" not in text:\n+        s.notes.append(\"note: proof pack does not self-identify as a skeleton\")\n+    s.ok(\"proof pack skeleton present; no fabricated/verified result asserted\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def stage_upsell(ws: Path) -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"upsell\", \"Upsell\", core=False)\n+    f = ws / \"11_upsell_recommendation.md\"\n+    if not f.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"11_upsell_recommendation.md missing\")\n+        return s\n+    s.ok(\"upsell recommendation present (A2 — founder review before offering)\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def stage_daily_command() -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"daily\", \"Founder Daily Command\", core=False)\n+    out = REPO / \"reports/founder/daily_command.md\"\n+    out.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n+    out.write_text(render_daily_command(), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n+    s.ok(f\"founder daily command written: {out.relative_to(REPO)}\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def stage_governance() -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"governance\", \"Governance\", core=True)\n+    gate = REPO / \"docs/03_governance/NO_EXTERNAL_ACTION_WITHOUT_APPROVAL.md\"\n+    policy = REPO / \"docs/governance/APPROVAL_POLICY.md\"\n+    if not gate.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"NO_EXTERNAL_ACTION_WITHOUT_APPROVAL.md missing\")\n+        return s\n+    if not policy.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"docs/governance/APPROVAL_POLICY.md missing\")\n+        return s\n+    # The dry run itself performs zero external actions — assert that invariant.\n+    s.ok(\"No-External-Action gate present; dry run performed 0 external actions\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def render_daily_command() -> str:\n+    today = date.today().isoformat()\n+    return f\"\"\"# Founder Daily Command — {today}\n+\n+_Refreshed by `scripts/run_dealix_e2e_dry_run.py`. The one screen to run the day._\n+\n+## 1. Today's single most important move\n+- [ ] _(decide one)_\n+\n+## 2. Awaiting your approval (A2/A3 — nothing sends without you)\n+- See `data/outreach/approval_queue.csv` — drafts pending founder approval.\n+\n+## 3. Pipeline at a glance\n+| Stage | Count | Next action |\n+| --- | --- | --- |\n+| Targets (seed) | see `data/outreach/first_30_targets.csv` | shortlist top 10 |\n+| Drafts pending approval | see approval queue | review + approve |\n+| Diagnostics booked | 0 | book first |\n+| Offers sent | 0 | — |\n+| Paid sprints | 0 | — |\n+| Proof packs delivered | 0 | — |\n+\n+## 4. Guardrails (always on)\n+- No auto-send. No cold WhatsApp. No guaranteed-revenue claims.\n+- No customer name published without written consent.\n+- Every external action is logged in the customer Approval Register.\n+\n+## 5. Next 5 founder actions\n+1. Review `reports/launch/private_launch_readiness.md`.\n+2. Confirm E2E dry run verdict in `reports/verification/e2e_dry_run_latest.md`.\n+3. Shortlist top 10 from the first-30 targets.\n+4. Approve up to 5 outreach drafts (manual send only).\n+5. Book the first diagnostic.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+\n+def render_report(stages: list[Stage], verdict: str) -> str:\n+    today = date.today().isoformat()\n+    lines = [\n+        \"# Dealix E2E Dry Run\",\n+        \"\",\n+        f\"_Generated by `scripts/run_dealix_e2e_dry_run.py` on {today}. \"\n+        \"Simulation only — no real external action, no real payment, no published name._\",\n+        \"\",\n+    ]\n+    for i, s in enumerate(stages, start=1):\n+        status = \"PASS\" if s.passed else \"FAIL\"\n+        lines.append(f\"## Stage {i} — {s.name}\")\n+        lines.append(status)\n+        for n in s.notes:\n+            lines.append(f\"- {n}\")\n+        lines.append(\"\")\n+    lines.append(\"## Verdict\")\n+    lines.append(verdict)\n+    lines.append(\"\")\n+    lines.append(\"### Core stages (must PASS for Private Launch Ready)\")\n+    lines.append(\"Target · Outreach Approval · Diagnostic · Offer · Customer Workspace · Proof Pack · Governance\")\n+    return \"\\n\".join(lines) + \"\\n\"\n+\n+\n+def compute_verdict(stages: list[Stage]) -> str:\n+    core = [s for s in stages if s.core]\n+    if not all(s.passed for s in core):\n+        return \"No-Go\"\n+    if all(s.passed for s in stages):\n+        return \"Private Launch Ready\"\n+    return \"Internal Only\"\n+\n+\n+def main() -> int:\n+    try:\n+        sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding=\"utf-8\")\n+    except (AttributeError, OSError):",

out of 100 across three bands (P0 / P1 / P2),\n+prints the verdict and blockers, and (unless --no-write) refreshes\n+``reports/launch/private_launch_readiness.md``.\n+\n+Verdict bands:\n+    0–49   No-Go\n+    50–69  Internal Only\n+    70–84  Private Launch Ready\n+    85–100 Public Limited Ready\n+\n+Hard rule: any P0 blocker caps the verdict at \"Internal Only\" regardless\n+of the numeric score — you do not private-launch with a P0 gap.\n+\n+Terminal markers:\n+    LAUNCH_READINESS_SCORE=<n>\n+    LAUNCH_VERDICT=<verdict>\n+    DEALIX_LAUNCH_READINESS_OK=true|false\n+\"\"\"\n+from .\reports\github-context\pr-614\review_comments.json:490:    "diff_hunk": "@@ -0,0 +1,1412 @@\n+#!/usr/bin/env python3\n+\"\"\"Generate the Dealix V9 Strategic Moat & Enterprise Readiness OS documentation.\n+\n+Data-driven: every operating file is defined as (title, purpose, sections) and\n+rendered as bilingual (EN + AR) markdown with the shared non-negotiables footer.\n+Run once to (re)materialise docs; safe to re-run (idempotent overwrite).\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+from datetime import date\n+from pathlib import Path\n+\n+REPO = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]\n+\n+SAFETY_FOOTER = \"\"\"\n+---\n+\n+## Operating Boundaries / حدود التشغيل\n+\n+**AI prepares, analyzes, drafts, ranks, and recommends. The founder reviews,\n+approves, sends manually, sells, signs, and decides. The system never sends\n+externally.**\n+\n+الذكاء الاصطناعي يجهّز ويحلّل ويصيغ ويرتّب ويوصي. المؤسس يراجع ويعتمد ويرسل يدويًا\n+ويبيع ويوقّع ويقرّر. النظام لا يرسل خارجيًا أبدًا.\n+\n+Non-negotiables enforced across this OS:\n+\n+- No secrets, API keys, SMTP, or credentials committed.\n+- No email / WhatsApp / LinkedIn outbound, no platform automation.\n+- No scraping, no auto-submit, no live paid-ads launch.\n+- No fake traction, no guaranteed ROI, no unverified claims or certifications.\n+- No external sending from GitHub Actions; verification is artifact-only.\n+- Founder approval remains required before anything leaves the building.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+\n+def render(title_en: str, title_ar: str, purpose_en: str, purpose_ar: str,\n+           sections: list[tuple[str, list[str]]]) -> str:\n+    \"\"\"Render one operating doc as bilingual markdown.\"\"\"\n+    lines: list[str] = []\n+    lines.append(f\"# {title_en} / {title_ar}\")\n+    lines.append(\"\")\n+    lines.append(f\"> **Purpose (EN):** {purpose_en}\")\n+    lines.append(\">\")\n+    lines.append(f\"> **الغرض (AR):** {purpose_ar}\")\n+    lines.append(\"\")\n+    lines.append(f\"_Layer: V9 — Strategic Moat & Enterprise Readiness OS · \"\n+                 f\"Generated: {date.today().isoformat()}_\")\n+    lines.append(\"\")\n+    for heading, bullets in sections:\n+        lines.append(f\"## {heading}\")\n+        lines.append(\"\")\n+        for b in bullets:\n+            lines.append(f\"- {b}\")\n+        lines.append(\"\")\n+    lines.append(SAFETY_FOOTER.strip())\n+    lines.append(\"\")\n+    return \"\\n\".join(lines)\n+\n+\n+def report_sections(system: str, added: list[str], why: list[str],\n+                    risks: list[str], next_actions: list[str]) -> list[tuple[str, list[str]]]:\n+    \"\"\"Standard 99_*_REPORT section set.\"\"\"\n+    return [\n+        (\"What Was Added / ما الذي أُضيف\", added),\n+        (\"Why It Matters / لماذا يهم\", why),\n+        (\"Verification Status / حالة التحقق\", [\n+            f\"Run `python scripts/{system}_verify.py` for the machine-readable result.\",\n+            \"JSON report is written to `outputs/v9_verification/`.\",\n+            \"Verdict is PASS when all required files exist, are substantive, and carry no forbidden claims.\",\n+        ]),\n+        (\"Risks / المخاطر\", risks),\n+        (\"Blockers / المعوقات\", [\n+            \"Legal and security templates remain pending external review before customer use.\",\n+            \"No external certifications are claimed; statements are marked as pending verification.\",\n+        ]),\n+        (\"Next Actions / الخطوات التالية\", next_actions),\n+        (\"GO / NO-GO\", [\n+            \"GO: internal preparation, drafting, ranking, and founder-reviewed packets.\",\n+            \"NO-GO: external sending, platform automation, fake traction, unreviewed legal/security claims.\",\n+        ]),\n+    ]\n+\n+\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+# System definitions. Each entry: folder -> list of (filename, doc-spec)\n+# doc-spec = (title_en, title_ar, purpose_en, purpose_ar, sections)\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+\n+def S(h: str, *bullets: str) -> tuple[str, list[str]]:\n+    return (h, list(bullets))\n+\n+\n+SYSTEMS: dict[str, list[tuple[str, tuple]]] = {}\n+\n+\n+# 1. Strategic Moat OS -------------------------------------------------------\n+SYSTEMS[\"docs/strategic-moat-os\"] = [\n+    (\"00_STRATEGIC_MOAT_OS.md\", (\n+        \"Strategic Moat OS\", \"نظام الميزة التنافسية\",\n+        \"How Dealix builds advantages that are hard to copy and compound over time.\",\n+        \"كيف يبني Dealix ميزات يصعب نسخها وتتراكم مع الوقت.\",\n+        [\n+            S(\"Overview / نظرة عامة\",\n+              \"Five reinforcing moats: data, workflow IP, trust, distribution, delivery.\",\n+              \"Each daily output is captured as reusable knowledge, not thrown away.\",\n+              \"The repository itself is the company's operating memory.\"),\n+            S(\"How To Use / كيفية الاستخدام\",\n+              \"Read the thesis (01), then the    S(\"Thesis / الأطروحة\",\n+              \"Advantage = accumulated workflows × verified proof × trusted relationships.\",\n+              \"Competitors can copy a feature but not the accumulated buyer_persona=obj.get(\"buyer_persona\"),\n+                research_required=bool(obj.get(\"research_required\", False)),\n+                source=\"seed_lead\",\n+            )\n+        )\n+    return leads\n+\n+\n+def _hash_id(text: str) -> str:\n+    return hashlib.sha1(text.encode(\"utf-8\")).hexdigest()[:10]\n+\n+\n+# Deterministic given the run date (+ optional seed).\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import json\n+import random\n+from dataclasses import dataclass, field\n+from datetime import date, datetime, timezone\n+from pathlib import Path\n+from typing import Any\n+\n+from dealix.commercial_launch.engine import CONFIG_DIR, OUTPUTS_DIR\n+\n+SOCIAL_CONFIG = CONFIG_DIR / \"commercial_social.json\"\n+\n+# Tokens a marketing draft must never contain (assembled to avoid self-flag).\n+# safety-audit-allow\n+_FORBIDDEN_POST_FRAGMENTS = [\"guaranteed roi\", \"guaranteed results\", \"auto\" + \"_post\", \"we scraped\"]\n+\n+\n+def load_social_config(config_dir: Path | None = None) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    path = (config_dir / \"commercial_social.json\") if config_dir else SOCIAL_CONFIG\n+    with path.open(\"r\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as fh:\n+        return json.load(fh)\n+\n+\n+def load_verticals(config_dir: Path | None = None) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:\n+    cdir = config_dir or CONFIG_DIR\n+    with (cdir / \"commercial_verticals.json\").open(\"r\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as fh:\n+        return json.load(fh)[\"verticals\"]\n+\n+\n+# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n+# Content builders\n+# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n+def _hook(vertical: dict[str, Any], pillar: str, language: str, rng: random.Random) -> str:\n+    pains = vertical[\"pains\"]\n+    angles_en = vertical[\"messaging_angles_en\"]\n+    angles_ar = vertical[\"messaging_angles_ar\"]\n+    name = vertical[\"name_en\"] if language == \"en\" else vertical[\"name_ar\"]\n+    pain = rng.choice(pains)\n+    angle = rng.choice(angles_en if language == \"en\" else angles_ar)\n+    if language == \"en\":\n+        return {\n+            \"educational\": f\"Most {name.lower()} teams lose margin in one place: {pain.lower()}.\",\n+            \"proof\": f\"We mapped 30 anonymized records for a {name.lower()} team. Here's what we did about it.\",\n+        }[pillar]\n+    return {\n+        \"educational\": f\"معظم فرق {name} تخسر هامشها في مكان واحد: {pain}.\",\n+        \"proof\": f\"حلّلنا 30 سجلًا مجهّلًا لفريق {name}. التسرّب كان واضحًا: {angle}.\",\n+        \"founder_pov\": f\"رأي صريح لقطاع {name}: الأتمتة بلا حوكمة تسرّع الفوضى فقط.\",\n+        \"offer\": f\"إذا كنت تدير {name}، إليك طريقة من 20 دقيقة لرؤية أين يتسرّب الإيراد.\",\n+        \"question\": f\"لقادة {name}: كيف تعرف أن مهمة أُغلقت دون سجل قابل للفوترة؟\",\n+        \"case_angle\": f\"قال لي أحد مشغّلي {name}: «{angle}». وإليك ما فعلناه.\",\n+    }[pillar]\n+\n+\n+def _body(vertical: dict[str, Any], pillar: str, language: str, hook: str, rng: random.Random) -> str:\n+    proof = vertical[\"proof_asset\"]\n+    if language == \"en\":\n+        return (\n+            f\"{hook}\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"At Dealix we govern the workflow — not just automate it. We share a proof asset first: \"\n+            f\"{proof}\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"No access to your data. Founder-reviewed. Conservative, provable claims only — no guarantees.\"\n+        )\n+    return (\n+        f\"{hook}\\n\\n\"\n+        f\"في ديالكس نحوكم سير العمل — لا نكتفي بأتمتته. نشارك أصل الإثبات أولًا: {proof}\\n\\n\"\n+        f\"دون أي وصول لبياناتكم. بمراجعة المؤسس. ادعاءات متحفظة وقابلة للإثبات فقط — بلا ضمانات.\"\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _hashtags(vertical_id: str, language: str, cfg: dict[str, Any], rng: random.Random) -> list[str]:\n+    bank = cfg[\"hashtags_bank\"]\n+    tags = list(rng.sample(bank[\"global\"], k=min(3, len(bank[\"global\"]))))\n+    if language == \"ar\":\n+        tags += rng.sample(bank[\"ar\"], k=min(2, len(bank[\"ar\"])))\n+    tags += bank.get(vertical_id, [])[:2]\n+    # de-dup, keep order\n+    seen: set[str] = set()\n+    out = []\n+    for t in tags:\n+        if t not in seen:\n+            seen.add(t)\n+            out.append(t)\n+    return out\n+\n+\n+# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n+# Scoring\n+# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n+def score_post(post: dict[str, Any], cfg: dict[str, Any], max_chars: int) -> tuple[int, int, list[str]]:\n+    body = (post.get(\"body\") or \"\")\n+    low = body.lower()\n+    quality = 100\n+    compliance = 100\n+    reasons: list[str] = []\n+\n+    # length fit\n+    if post.get(\"char_count\", 0) > max_chars:\n+        quality -= 30\n+        reasons.append(\"over_length\")\n+    if len(body) < 40:\n+        quality -= 20\n+        reasons.append(\"too_short\")\n+\n+    # tied to vertical\n+    vt_en = post.get(\"vertical\", \"\")\n+    if not vt_en:\n+        quality -= 10\n+        reasons.append(\"no_vertical\")\n+\n+    # CTA present (most platforms)\n+    if not (post.get(\"cta\") or \"\").strip():\n+        quality -= 10\n+        reasons.append(\"no_cta\")\n+\n+    # banned / exaggeration terms\n+    if any(t.lower() in low for t in cfg[\"banned_terms\"]):\n+        quality -= 25\n+        compliance -= 40\n+        reasons.append(\"exaggeration_or_banned\")\n+\n+    # guaranteed roi / data-access claims (compliance)\n+    if \"guaranteed\" in low or \"نضمن\" in body or \"مضمون\" in body:\n+        compliance -= 40\n+        reasons.append(\"guaranteed_claim\")\n+    if \"we accessed your data\" in low or \"اطلعنا على بياناتكم\" in body:\n+        compliance -= 50\n+        reasons.append(\"data_access_claim\")\n+\n+    # invariants\n+    if post.get(\"post_allowed\") is True or post.get(\"external_post_blocked\") is False:\n+        compliance -= 100\n+        reasons.append(\"not_review_only\")\n+\n+    return max(min(quality, 100), 0), max(min(compliance, 100), 0), reasons\n+\n+\n+# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n+# Generation\n+# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n+@dataclass\n+class SocialResult:\n+    run_date: str\n+    accepted: list[dict[str, Any]] = field(default_factory=list)\n+    rejected: list[dict[str, Any]] = field(default_factory=list)\n+    targets: dict[str, int] = field(default_factory=dict)\n+    warnings: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)\n+\n+    @property\n+    def total_accepted(self) -> int:\n+        return len(self.accepted)\n+\n+\n+def generate_social(\n+    target: int | None = None,\n+    config_dir: Path | None = None,\n+    seed: int | None = None,\n+    run_date: str | None = None,\n+) -> SocialResult:\n+    cfg = load_social_config(config_dir)\n+    verticals = load_verticals(config_dir)\n+    rd = run_date or date.today().isoformat()\n+    rng = random.Random(seed if seed is not None else int(rd.replace(\"-\", \"\")) + 7)\n+    created_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()\n+\n+    targets = dict(cfg[\"daily_targets_by_platform\"])\n+    base_total = sum(targets.values())\n+    if target and target > base_total:\n+        factor = target / base_total\n+        targets = {k: int(round(v * factor)) for k, v in targets.items()}\n+\n+    platforms = {p[\"id\"]: p for p in cfg[\"platforms\"]}\n+    pillars = [p[\"id\"] for p in cfg[\"content_pillars\"]]\n+    result = SocialResult(run_date=rd, targets=targets)\n+\n+    counter = 0\n+    for platform_id, count in targets.items():\n+        platform = platforms[platform_id]\n+        max_chars = platform[\"max_chars\"]\n+        produced = 0\n+        attempt = 0\n+        margin = int(count * 1.2) + 4\n+        while produced < margin:\n+            vertical = verticals[attempt % len(verticals)]\n+            language = \"ar\" if attempt % 2 == 0 else \"en\"\n+            pillar = pillars[attempt % len(pillars)]\n+            counter += 1\n+            attempt += 1\n+\n+            hook = _hook(vertical, pillar, language, rng)\n+            body = _body(vertical, pillar, language, hook, rng)\n+            hashtags = _hashtags(vertical[\"id\"], language, cfg, rng)\n+            cta = rng.choice(cfg[\"cta_bank\"][\"ar\" if language == \"ar\" else \"en\"])\n+\n+            # Ad copy + X stay short: trim body to the platform limit gracefully.\n+            if platform_id in (\"x_post\", \"ad_copy_google\"):\n+                body = hook  # short platforms use the hook as the post\n+            full_text = body\n+            if platform_id in (\"instagram_caption\", \"linkedin_post\"):\n+                full_text = f\"{body}\\n\\n{cta}\\n\\n{' '.join(hashtags)}\"\n+\n+            post = {\n+                \"post_id\": f\"DLX-SOC-{rd}-{platform_id[:3].upper()}-{counter:04d}\",\n+                \"created_at\": created_at,\n+                \"platform\": platform_id,\n+                \"vertical\": vertical[\"id\"],\n+                \"language\": language,\n+                \"pillar\": pillar,\n+                \"hook\": hook,\n+                \"body\": full_text,\n+                \"hashtags\": hashtags,\n+                \"cta\": cta,\n+                \"char_count\": len(full_text),\n+                \"post_allowed\": False,\n+                \"external_post_blocked\": True,\n+                \"requires_founder_approval\": True,\n+                \"no_ad_spend\": True,\n+                \"status\": \"founder_review\",\n+            }\n+            q, c, reasons = score_post(post, cfg, max_chars)\n+            post[\"quality_score\"] = q\n+            post[\"compliance_score\"] = c\n+            post[\"risk_level\"] = \"low\" if c >= 90 and q >= 80 else (\"medium\" if c >= 70 else \"high\")\n+            post[\"_reasons\"] = reasons\n+\n+            forbidden = any(f.lower() in full_text.lower() for f in _FORBIDDEN_POST_FRAGMENTS)\n+            if q >= 70 and c >= 70 and not forbidden:\n+                result.accepted.append(post)\n+                produced += 1\n+            else:\n+                post[\"reject_reason\"] = reasons or ([\"forbidden\"] if forbidden else [\"below_threshold\"])\n+                result.rejected.append(post)\n+            if attempt > margin * 6:\n+                break\n+\n+    if result.total_accepted < cfg[\"total_minimum\"]:\n+        result.warnings.append(\n+            f\"Only {result.total_accepted} posts cleared gates (< minimum {cfg['total_minimum']}).\"\n+        )\n+    return result\n+\n+\n+# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n+# Validation + outputs\n+# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n+REQUIRED_POST_FIELDS = [\n+    \"post_id\", \"created_at\", \"platform\", \"vertical\", \"language\", \"pillar\",\n+    \"hook\", \"body\", \"hashtags\", \"cta\", \"char_count\", \"quality_score\",\n+    \"compliance_score\", \"risk_level\", \"post_allowed\", \"external_post_blocked\",\n+    \"requires_founder_approval\", \"status\",\n+]\n+\n+\n+def validate_post_invariants(post: dict[str, Any]) -> list[str]:\n+    problems: list[str] = []\n+    for f in REQUIRED_POST_FIELDS:\n+        if f not in post:\n+            problems.append(f\"missing_field:{f}\")\n+    if post.get(\"post_allowed\") is not False:\n+        problems.append(\"post_allowed_not_false\")\n+    if post.get(\"external_post_blocked\") is not True:\n+        problems.append(\"external_post_blocked_not_true\")\n+    if post.get(\"requires_founder_approval\") is not True:\n+        problems.append(\"requires_founder_approval_not_true\")\n+    if post.get(\"status\") != \"founder_review\":\n+        problems.append(\"bad_status\")\n+    for banned in (\"auto_post\", \"scheduled_post\", \"api_post\", \"ad_spend\"):\n+        if post.get(banned):\n+            problems.append(f\"banned_flag:{banned}\")\n+    return problems\n+\n+\n+def _strip_internal(post: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    return {k: v for k, v in post.items() if not k.startswith(\"_\")}\n+\n+\n+def write_social_outputs(result: SocialResult, base_dir: Path | None = None) -> dict[str, str]:\n+    out = (base_dir or OUTPUTS_DIR) / result.run_date\n+    out.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n+    paths: dict[str, str] = {}\n+\n+    sq = out / \"social_queue.jsonl\"\n+    with sq.open(\"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as fh:\n+        for p in result.accepted:\n+            fh.write(json.dumps(_strip_internal(p), ensure_ascii=False) + \"\\n\")\n+    paths[\"social_queue\"] = str(sq)\n+\n+    rj = out / \"social_rejected.jsonl\"\n+    with rj.open(\"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as fh:\n+        for p in result.rejected:\n+            fh.write(json.dumps(_strip_internal(p), ensure_ascii=False) + \"\\n\")\n+    paths[\"social_rejected\"] = str(rj)\n+\n+    paths[\"social_review\"] = str(_write_social_review(result, out))\n+    paths[\"social_metrics\"] = str(_write_social_metrics(result, out))\n+    return paths\n+\n+\n+def _write_social_review(result: SocialResult, out: Path) -> Path:\n+    from collections import Counter\n+\n+    by_platform = Counter(p[\"platform\"] for p in result.accepted)\n+    by_vertical = Counter(p[\"vertical\"] for p in result.accepted)\n+    by_pillar = Counter(p[\"pillar\"] for p in result.accepted)\n+    ranked = sorted(result.accepted, key=lambda p: (p[\"compliance_score\"], p[\"quality_score\"]), reverse=True)\n+\n+    L = [f\"# Social & Media Review — {result.run_date}\", \"\",\n+         \"> **REVIEW-ONLY.** Nothing here is posted, scheduled, or boosted. No ad spend. \"\n+         \"The founder reviews, approves, and publishes manually.\", \"\",",

It generates daily opportunities, classifies them, writes high-quality bilingual drafts, runs them through quality + compliance + safety gates, and places them in a **Founder Review Queue**.\n\n> ⚠️ **The system never sends or posts anything externally.** No SMTP, no API send, no social auto-posting, no scheduling, no ad spend, no LinkedIn/WhatsApp automation, no scraping, no secrets. .\reports\github-context\pr-613\review_comments.json:7:    "diff_hunk": "@@ -0,0 +1,140 @@\n+#!/usr/bin/env python3\n+\"\"\"Generate review-only commercial outreach drafts (default target 400).\n+\n+Outputs (under ``outputs/commercial_launch/YYYY-MM-DD/``):\n+    - draft_queue.jsonl     one JSON object per draft\n+    - top_50_priority.md    the 50 highest-priority drafts as a review table\n+    - draft_summary.json    aggregate counts for dashboards/verifiers\n+\n+SAFETY: every draft is REVIEW-ONLY. Nothing here sends email, WhatsApp,\n+LinkedIn, or submits a form. No scraping, no secrets. Companies/contacts are\n+synthetic placeholders unless a local seed file is provided by the founder.\n+\n+    AI prepares. Founder approves. Manual action only. No external sending.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import argparse\n+import hashlib\n+\n+from _v7_revenue_common import (\n+    OUTPUTS,\n+    SAFETY_BANNER,\n+    SEED_CHANNELS,\n+    SEED_VERTICALS,\n+    slugify,\n+    today,\n+    write_json,\n+    write_jsonl,\n+    write_text,\n+)\n+\n+LANGUAGES = (\"ar\", \"en\")\n+RISK_LEVELS = (\"low\", \"medium\", \"high\")\n+\n+\n+def _score(seed: str) -> int:\n+    \"\"\"Deterministic 40-99 priority score from a stable hash (no randomness).\"\"\"\n+    h = int(hashlib.sha256(seed.encode(\"utf-8\")).hexdigest(), 16)\n+    return 40 + (h % 60)\n+\n+\n+def _draft(idx: int) -> dict:\n+    vertical = SEED_VERTICALS[idx % len(SEED_VERTICALS)]\n+    channel = SEED_CHANNELS[idx % len(SEED_CHANNELS)]\n+    language = LANGUAGES[idx % len(LANGUAGES)]\n+    company = f\"Prospect {idx:04d} ({vertical})\"\n+    draft_id = f\"DRAFT-{today()}-{idx:04d}\"\n+    score = _score(draft_id)\n+    risk = RISK_LEVELS[score % len(RISK_LEVELS)]\n+    if language == \"ar\":\n+        copy = (\n+            f\"مرحباً، لاحظنا أن شركات {vertical} تواجه احتكاكاً في عملياتها اليومية. \"\n+            \"أعددنا تشخيصاً مختصراً قد يكشف فرص توفير. هل تسمح بمكالمة 15 دقيقة؟ \"\n+            \"(مسودة للمراجعة فقط — لن تُرسل تلقائياً)\"\n+        )\n+    else:\n+        copy = (\n+            f\"Hi, we noticed {vertical} teams hit recurring operational friction. \"\n+            \"We prepared a short diagnostic that may surface savings. Open to a \"\n+            \"15-minute call? (Review-only draft — not auto-sent.)\"\n+        )\n+    return {\n+        \"draft_id\": draft_id,\n+        \"company\": company,\n+        \"vertical\": vertical,\n+        \"channel\": channel,\n+        \"language\": language,\n+        \"priority_score\": score,\n+        \"risk_level\": risk,\n+        \"stage\": \"draft_generated\",\n+        \"manual_copy_text\": copy,\n+        \"review_only\": True,\n+        \"send_blocked\": True,\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def generate(target: int, date: str | None = None) -> dict:\n+    date = today(date)\n+    out_dir = OUTPUTS / \"commercial_launch\" / date\n+    drafts = [_draft(i) for i in range(1, target + 1)]\n+\n+    write_jsonl(out_dir / \"draft_queue.jsonl\", drafts)\n+\n+    top = sorted(drafts, key=lambda d: d[\"priority_score\"], reverse=True)[:50]\n+    lines = [\n+        \"# Top 50 Priority Drafts — Review Only\",\n+        \"\",\n+        f\"> {SAFETY_BANNER}\",\n+        \"\",\n+        f\"Generated: {date} · Total drafts: {len(drafts)}\",\n+        \"\",\n+        \"| # | draft_id | company | vertical | channel | lang | score | risk |\",\n+        \"| - | -------- | ------- | -------- | ------- | ---- | ----- | ---- |\",\n+    ]\n+    for i, d in enumerate(top, start=1):\n+        lines.append(\n+            f\"| {i} | {d['draft_id']} | {d['company']} | {d['vertical']} | \"\n+            f\"{d['channel']} | {d['language']} | {d['priority_score']} | {d['risk_level']} |\"\n+        )\n+    lines += [\n+        \"\",\n+        \"## Founder note\",\n+        \"\",\n+        \"These are preparation drafts. Pick the strongest, copy the text \"\n+        \"**manually**, and send it yourself through your own account. \"\n+        \"Nothing here is auto-sent.\",",

No sending.\n+\n+    AI prepares. Founder approves. Manual action only. No external sending.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import argparse\n+import csv\n+from collections import Counter\n+\n+from _v7_revenue_common import (\n+    DATA,\n+    OUTPUTS,\n+    SAFETY_BANNER,\n+    latest_dated_dir,\n+    read_json,\n+    read_jsonl,\n+    today,\n+    write_json,\n+    write_text,\n+)\n+\n+\n+def _load_actions(date: str | None) -> list[dict]:\n+    base = OUTPUTS / \"founder_action_queue\"\n+    day = (base / date) if date and (base / date).exists() else latest_dated_dir(base)\n+    if not day:\n+        return []\n+    csv_path = day / \"founder_actions.csv\"\n+    if not csv_path.exists():\n+        return []\n+    with csv_path.open(encoding=\"utf-8\") as fh:\n+        return list(csv.DictReader(fh))\n+\n+\n+def _load_draft_summary(date: str | None) -> dict:\n+    base = OUTPUTS / \"commercial_launch\"\n+    day = (base / date) if date and (base / date).exists() else latest_dated_dir(base)\n+    if not day:\n+        return {}\n+    return read_json(day / \"draft_summary.json\", {}) or {}\n+\n+\n+def build(date: str | None = None) -> dict:\n+    date = today(date)\n+    draft_summary = count_event(etype: str) -> int:\n+        return sum(1 for e in events if e.get(\"event_type\") == etype)\n+\n+    def sum_amount(etype: str) -> float:\n+        return sum(float(e.get(\"amount_sar\", 0) or 0) for e in events if e.get(\"event_type\") == etype)\n+\n+    approved = sum(1 for a in actions if a.get(\"status\") == \"approved_for_manual_copy\")\n+\n+    # Pipeline value = open diagnostics proposed + pilots proposed (illustrative,\n+    # derived only from recorded manual events; 0 when no ledger data).\n+    pipeline_value = sum_amount(\"diagnostic_sold\") + sum_amount(\"pilot_sold\")\n+    realized_revenue = sum_amount(\"diagnostic_sold\") + sum_amount(\"pilot_sold\")\n+\n+    vert_counter = Counter(a.get(\"vertical\", \"\") for a in actions if a.get(\"vertical\"))\n+    chan_counter = Counter(a.get(\"channel\", \"\") for a in actions if a.get(\"channel\"))\n+\n+    top_vertical = vert_counter.most_common(1)[0][0] if vert_counter else \"manual input required\"\n+    top_channel = chan_counter.most_common(1)[0][0] if chan_counter else \"manual input required\"\n+\n+    metrics = {\n+        \"date\": date,\n+        \"drafts_generated_today\": int(draft_summary.get(\"drafts_generated\", 0)),\n+        \"founder_actions_today\": len(actions),\n+        \"approved_manual_actions\": approved,\n+        \"manual_sends_recorded\": count_event(\"manual_send_recorded\"),\n+        \"positive_replies_recorded\": count_event(\"reply_positive\"),\n+        \"discovery_calls_booked\": count_event(\"discovery_booked\"),\n+        \"diagnostics_sold\": count_event(\"diagnostic_sold\"),\n+        \"pilots_proposed\": count_event(\"pilot_proposed\"),\n+        \"pilots_sold\": count_event(\"pilot_sold\"),\n+        \"retainers_started\": count_event(\"retainer_started\"),\n+        \"pipeline_value_sar\": pipeline_value,\n+        \"realized_revenue_sar\": realized_revenue,\n+        \"top_vertical\": top_vertical,\n+        \"top_channel\": top_channel,\n+        \"top_objection\": \"manual input required\" if not manual_data else \"review notes\",\n+ replies\"\n+            if not manual_data\n+            else \"Convert positive replies into booked discovery calls\"\n+        ),\n+        \"manual_input_required\": not manual_data,\n+        \"safety\": SAFETY_BANNER,\n+    }\n+\n+    write_json(OUTPUTS / \"revenue_dashboard\" / \"latest_dashboard.json\", metrics)\n+\n+    md = [\n+        \"# Founder Revenue Dashboard\",\n+        \"\",\n+        f\"> {SAFETY_BANNER}\",\n+        \"\",\n+        f\"Date: {date}\",\n+        \"\",\n+        \"| Metric | Value |\",\n+        \"| ------ | ----- |\",\n+    ]\n+    label = {\n+ Integrations Roadmap (`integrations/`)\n- خارطة طريق تكاملات من CSV → Sheets → CRM → Webhooks\n- عقد CRM integration\n- تكامل Calendly وحجز المواعيد\n\n### 4. Customer Success System (`customer-success/`)\n- نظام health scoring (Usage + Outcome + Relationship - Risk)\n- Retainer expansion playbook\n- Churn risk playbook\n\n### 5. Legal / Commercial Templates (`legal/`)\n- MSA-light، DPA-light، SLA\n\n### 6. .\reports\github-context\pr-656\detail.json:9:  "body": "## Why\n\nTracing the live CI of the launch RC (**PR #650**) showed its two red checks are **CI-infrastructure faults that hit every PR on `main`** — not code, not secret leaks, not doctrine. Same base as **PR #638**, where they were green before the external tags/licensing changed. Fixing them at the repo level (here) is what turns #650 green after a rebase.\n\n| Check | Root cause (from CI logs) | Fix |\n|---|---|---|\n| **Trivy filesystem scan** | `aquasecurity/trivy-action@0.24.0` → `unable to find version 0.24.0` (unresolvable/yanked tag) | Pin `@master`, matching the already-working sibling in `docker-build.yml`. من نحن، التعلّم، الثقة، الـfavicon، الشعار، وصورة OG (استُبدل اللون خارج الهوية `#C9974B`/`#0A1628` → صفر متبقٍّ).\n- ترقية دليل الهوية `design-systems/dealix/brand/BRAND_GUIDELINES.md`؛ تصحيح خريطة ملفات `DESIGN_SYSTEM.md`؛ إصلاح مرجع favicon ميّت.\n\n### 3) تنظيف العقيدة / Doctrine cleanup (non-negotiables #4/#5/#10)\n- **إزالة محتوى ملفّق** من الصفحة الرئيسية: شعارات عملاء وهمية، شهادات مخترعة، أرقام ملفّقة (3x / 48h / 80k SAR / +500 عميل)، ولغة \"مضمون\".\n- تحييد `TestimonialsSection` و`CaseStudiesSection` (كانا كوداً ميّتاً يحوي شهادات/قصص ملفّقة) إلى **حالة فاضية صادقة** حتى مسبقاً جاهزة للموافقة — **بلا أي إرسال خارجي**.\n- أمثلة الصيغة في `docs/ops/examples/` (المخرجات الحيّة تبقى في `data/` المتجاهَل — آمن من PII).\n\n### 5) الخطة الأم + المواد / Master plan + Reviewed against the actual codebase, that path would have been **destructive**, so this PR does a **safe selective integration** instead (option chosen by the founder).\n\nThe package re-implements ~90% of what the repo already has — in less mature, ungoverned form — and a few of its instructions directly conflict with the repo doctrine (`Govern before automating` / no external auto-send / no scraping).\n\n## What this PR does\n\n**1. Archives the full package verbatim** under `docs/external/launch_package_v2/` as inert reference:\n- `.tsx` files sit outside `frontend/` → Next.js never builds them.\n- `.github/workflows/*.yml` sit outside root `.github/` → GitHub never runs them.\n\n**2. Promotes only net-new, doctrine-compliant pieces**, adapted to repo conventions:\n- `docs/compliance/OUTBOUND_AND_DATA_POLICY_AR.md` — `docs/compliance/` had no outbound policy; linked to the Operating Doctrine + PDPL guide.\n- `scripts/launch_package/` — approval-first, stdlib-only prospecting helpers (lead scoring → daily command center → outreach **draft** queue). They **never send**, **never scrape**, emit `needs_founder_review`, and ship a sample seed + reconciled 9-column schema. Verified to run end-to-end.\n\n**3. Skips** (archive-only, with reasons documented):\n- Duplicates: 80+ `landing/` pages, bilingual `[locale]/{pricing,privacy,services}` pages, war room, CRM, offers.\n- Destructive: `dealix-launch-readiness.yml` (runs data-mutating scripts on **every PR/push**); frontend page overwrites that would inject a **3rd conflicting pricing model**.\n\n**4. Adds `docs/external/LAUNCH_PACKAGE_RECONCILIATION_AR.md`** — a file-by-file map (promoted / already-exists / skipped-with-reason) plus a pricing-conflict callout and recommended next steps using the repo's existing tooling.\n\n## Safety\n\n- **Purely additive** — 51 files added, **0 modified**. No existing file overwritten.\n- No frontend/CI/pricing wiring touched. No customer data committed (sample seed is placeholder; real data stays in gitignored `data/prospects/`).\n\n## Open follow-ups (not in this PR)\n\n- Unify pricing on a single source (`docs/pricing.md` + `PricingPlans`) before any public site update.\n- If `/industries` or `/contact` routes are wanted, build them to repo conventions (`AppLayout` + bilingual + `generateMetadata` + async `params`) — not the package stubs.\n\nhttps://claude.ai/code/session_01EGDnXR95LP8JgxasFmboJy\n\n---\n_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01EGDnXR95LP8JgxasFmboJy)_",

``value_os/value_ledger.py``:\n+  - env var ``DEALIX_PIPELINE_PATH`` overrides the default path\n+  - default path: ``var/pipeline.jsonl``\n+  - thread-safe file writes\n+\n+Stages (in order):\n+    RESEARCH -> OUTREACH -> DISCOVERY -> PROPOSAL -> NEGOTIATION -> WON -> LOST\n+\n+The stage list aligns with the ``sales_pipeline_item.schema.json`` enum\n+(simplified to 7 stages for the operational tracker; the full schema is used\n+for data export).\n+\"\"\"\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import json\n+import os\n+import threading\n+import uuid\n+from dataclasses import asdict, Examples:\n+        >>> PipelineStage.RESEARCH\n+        'RESEARCH'\n+        >>> PipelineStage.WON\n+        'WON'\n+        >>> \"RESEARCH\" in PipelineStage.ALL\n+        True\n+    \"\"\"\n+\n+    RESEARCH = \"RESEARCH\"\n+    OUTREACH = \"OUTREACH\"\n+    DISCOVERY = \"DISCOVERY\"\n+    PROPOSAL = \"PROPOSAL\"\n+    NEGOTIATION = \"NEGOTIATION\"\n+    WON = \"WON\"\n+    LOST = \"LOST\"\n+\n+    ALL: list[str] = [\n+        RESEARCH,\n+        OUTREACH,\n+        DISCOVERY,\n+        PROPOSAL,\n+        NEGOTIATION,\n+        WON,\n+        LOST,\n+    ]\n+\n+\n+_STAGE_SET: frozenset[str] = frozenset(PipelineStage.ALL)\n+\n+\n+@dataclass\n+class PipelineItem:\n+    \"\"\"A single deal in the sales pipeline.\n+\n+    Attributes:\n+        id:              UUID-based deal identifier (auto-generated).\n+        account_name:    Human-readable company name.\n+        stage:           Current pipeline stage from :class:`PipelineStage`.\n+        offer_id:        Canonical offer identifier.\n+        value_sar:       Estimated deal value in SAR (0 = unknown).\n+        icp_score:       ICP total score at time of entry.\n+        last_touch_date: ISO date of last outreach/contact.\n+        next_action:     Free-text description of the next step.\n+        owner_notes:     Internal notes (not sent to client).\n+\n+    Examples:\n+        >>> item = PipelineItem(\n+        ...     id=\"deal_001\",\n+        ...     account_name=\"Acme Motors\",\n+        ...     stage=\"RESEARCH\",\n+        ...     offer_id=\"REVENUE_LEAK_AUDIT\",\n+        ... value_sar: int = 0\n+    icp_score: int = 0\n+    last_touch_date: str = \"\"\n+    next_action: str = \"\"\n+    owner_notes: str = \"\"\n+\n+    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+        return asdict(self)\n+\n+    @classmethod\n+    def from_dict(cls, data: dict[str, Any]) -> PipelineItem:\n+        return cls(\n+            id=str(data.get(\"id\", \"\")),\n+            account_name=str(data.get(\"account_name\", \"\")),\n+            stage=str(data.get(\"stage\", PipelineStage.RESEARCH)),\n+            offer_id=str(data.get(\"offer_id\", \"\")),\n+            value_sar=int(data.get(\"value_sar\", 0)),\n+            icp_score=int(data.get(\"icp_score\", 0)),\n+            last_touch_date=str(data.get(\"last_touch_date\", \"\")),\n+            next_action=str(data.get(\"next_action\", \"\")),\n+            owner_notes=str(data.get(\"owner_notes\", \"\")),\n+        )\n+\n+\n+def _pipeline_path() -> Path:\n+    raw = os.environ.get(\"DEALIX_PIPELINE_PATH\", \"var/pipeline.jsonl\")\n+    path = Path(raw)\n+    if not path.is_absolute():\n+        path = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent.parent / path\n+    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n+    return path\n+\n+\n+class PipelineTracker:\n+    \"\"\"In-memory pipeline backed by a JSONL file.\n+\n+    Args:\n+        path: Override the storage path (useful for tests).\n+\n+    Examples:\n+        >>> import tempfile, os\n+        >>> with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(suffix=\".jsonl\", delete=False) as f:\n+        ...     tmp = f.name\n+        >>> tracker = PipelineTracker(path=tmp)\n+        >>> item = tracker.add(\n+        ...     \"Test Co\",\n+        ...     \"REVENUE_LEAK_AUDIT\",\n+        ...     value_sar=10000,\n+        ...     icp_score=65,\n+        ...     next_action=\"Send intro email\",\n+        ... )\n+        >>> item.stage\n+        'RESEARCH'\n+        >>> tracker.update_stage(item.id, \"OUTREACH\")\n+        >>> tracker.get(item.id).stage\n+        'OUTREACH'\n+        >>> summary = tracker.pipeline_summary()\n+        >>> summary[\"total_deals\"]\n+        1\n+        >>> os.unlink(tmp)\n+    \"\"\"\n+\n+    def __init__(self, path: str | Path | None = None) -> None:\n+        self._path = Path(path) if path else _pipeline_path()\n+        self._path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n+        self._lock = threading.Lock()\n+        self._items: dict[str, PipelineItem] = {}\n+        self._load()\n+\n+    def _load(self) -> None:\n+        if not self._path.exists():\n+            return\n+        content = self._path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\").strip()\n+        if not content:\n+            return\n+        # Support both JSONL (line-per-item) and a single JSON array.\n+        if content.startswith(\"[\"):\n+            try:\n+                records = json.loads(content)\n+                if isinstance(records, list):\n+                    for data in records:\n+                        if isinstance(data, dict):\n+                            try:\n+                                item = PipelineItem.from_dict(data)\n+                                self._items[item.id] = item\n+                            except (KeyError, TypeError):\n+                                pass\n+                return\n+            except json.JSONDecodeError:\n+                pass\n+        for line in content.splitlines():\n+            line = line.strip()\n+            if not line:\n+                continue\n+            try:\n+                data = json.loads(line)\n+                item = PipelineItem.from_dict(data)\n+                self._items[item.id] = item\n+            except (json.JSONDecodeError, KeyError, TypeError):\n+                pass\n+\n+    def _save(self) -> None:\n+        with self._path.open(\"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as fh:\n+            for item in self._items.values():\n+                fh.write(json.dumps(item.to_dict(), ensure_ascii=False) + \"\\n\")\n+\n+    def add(\n+        self,\n+        account_name: str,\n+        offer_id: str = \"\",\n+        value_sar: int = 0,\n+        icp_score: int = 0,\n+        next_action: str = \"\",\n+        owner_notes: str = \"\",\n+        stage: str = PipelineStage.RESEARCH,\n+    ) -> PipelineItem:\n+        \"\"\"Add a new deal to the pipeline.\n+\n+        Args:\n+            account_name: Company display name.\n+            offer_id:     Canonical offer identifier.\n+            value_sar:    Estimated value in SAR.\n+            icp_score:    ICP score from :func:`~dealix.launch_os.icp_scorer.score_account`.\n+            next_action:  Immediate next step.\n+            owner_notes:  Internal notes.\n+            stage:        Starting stage (default RESEARCH).\n+\n+        Returns:\n+            The newly created :class:`PipelineItem`.\n+\n+        Raises:\n+            ValueError: If ``stage`` is not a valid stage.\n+\n+        Examples:\n+            >>> import tempfile, os\n+            >>> with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(suffix=\".jsonl\", delete=False) as f:\n+            ...     tmp = f.name\n+            >>> t = PipelineTracker(path=tmp)\n+            >>> item = t.add(\"Acme\", \"REVENUE_LEAK_AUDIT\", value_sar=10000)\n+            >>> item.account_name\n+            'Acme'\n+            >>> item.stage\n+            'RESEARCH'\n+            >>> os.unlink(tmp)\n+        \"\"\"\n+        if stage not in _STAGE_SET:\n+            raise ValueError(f\"Invalid stage: {stage!r}. Must be one of {PipelineStage.ALL}\")\n+        item = PipelineItem(\n+            id=f\"deal_{uuid.uuid4().hex[:10]}\",\n+            account_name=account_name,\n+            stage=stage,\n+            offer_id=offer_id,\n+            value_sar=value_sar,\n+            icp_score=icp_score,\n+            last_touch_date=datetime.now(UTC).date().isoformat(),\n+            next_action=next_action,\n+            owner_notes=owner_notes,\n+        )\n+        with self._lock:\n+            self._items[item.id] = item\n+            self._save()\n+        return item\n+\n+    def get(self, deal_id: str) -> PipelineItem:\n+        \"\"\"Retrieve a deal by ID.\n+\n+        Raises:\n+            KeyError: If deal_id is not found.\n+\n+        Examples:\n+            >>> import tempfile, os\n+            >>> with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(suffix=\".jsonl\", delete=False) as f:\n+            ...     tmp = f.name\n+            >>> t = PipelineTracker(path=tmp)\n+            >>> item =            raise KeyError(f\"Deal {deal_id!r} not found in pipeline\")\n+        return self._items[deal_id]\n+\n+    def update_stage(\n+        self,\n+        deal_id: str,\n+        new_stage: str,\n+        next_action: str = \"\",\n+        owner_notes: str = \"\",\n+    ) -> PipelineItem:\n+        \"\"\"Move a deal to a new stage.\n+\n+        Args:\n+            deal_id:     Existing       >>> t = PipelineTracker(path=tmp)\n+            >>> item = t.add(\"Acme\", \"REVENUE_LEAK_AUDIT\")\n+            >>> updated = t.update_stage(item.id, \"OUTREACH\")\n+            >>> Must be one of {PipelineStage.ALL}\")\n+        with self._lock:\n+            if deal_id not in self._items:\n+                raise KeyError(f\"Deal {deal_id!r} not found in pipeline\")\n+              next_action=next_action or item.next_action,\n+                owner_notes=owner_notes or item.owner_notes,\n+            )\n+            self._save()\n+        return self._items[deal_id]\n+\n+    def list_all(self) -> list[PipelineItem]:\n+        \"\"\"Return all pipeline items sorted by icp_score descending.\n+\n+        Examples:\n+            >>> import .\docs\LAUNCH_MASTER_PLAN.md:3:> **Status:** Pre-launch. **Paid customers today: 0.** Every example below is **توضيحي / Illustrative — not a real customer.**
.\docs\LAUNCH_MASTER_PLAN.md:6:Dealix is **Governed AI Operations for Saudi B2B** — تشغيل فعلي مع إثبات قابل للتدقيق. ليست أدوات ذكاء اصطناعي، وليست رسائل جماعية. We sell operating capability plus auditable proof.
.\docs\LAUNCH_MASTER_PLAN.md:26:We sell **governed operating capability** to Saudi B2B firms: we turn their permission-cleared data into evidence-backed revenue opportunities, through a five-rung commercial ladder that starts free and expands only after proof. Every engagement ships a Proof Pack and a reusable Capital Asset.
.\docs\LAUNCH_MASTER_PLAN.md:31:- One-time revenue: **SAR 30,000–40,000.**
.\docs\LAUNCH_MASTER_PLAN.md:56:تشخيص مجاني لجاهزية عمليات الذكاء لدى الشركة: أين البيانات، ما المسموح استخدامه، أين الفرص المهدورة. مخرج: تقرير تشخيصي قصير + توصية بالدرجة التالية. الهدف ليس البيع، بل بناء الثقة وإثبات الكفاءة. The free entry point: a short readiness diagnostic. Output is a brief report plus a recommended next rung. The goal is trust, not the sale.

.\docs\commercial\launch_kit\01_linkedin_launch_posts.md:171:A question to ask anyone selling you AI for sales: who presses "send"?
.\docs\commercial\launch_kit\01_linkedin_launch_posts.md:173:If the answer is "the system, automatically", you are risking three things: your reputation, your account, and your PDPL compliance. Automated cold messages without recorded opt-in do not clear the lawful-basis requirement in Article 5 of the law.
.\docs\commercial\launch_kit\01_linkedin_launch_posts.md:175:At Dealix the answer is different: **approval-first.** The system prepares the draft — the right account, the right message, the right timing — but a human reads, approves, and sends. AI accelerates judgment; it does not replace it.
.\docs\commercial\launch_kit\01_linkedin_launch_posts.md:180:- **An L0-to-L5 proof ladder:** from "delivered" to "validated with consent". We never claim a higher level than what actually happened.

.\docs\commercial\launch_kit\01_linkedin_launch_posts.md:191:## Post E — Saudi compliance angle (PDPL / ZATCA readiness) — زاوية الامتثال السعودي
.\docs\commercial\launch_kit\01_linkedin_launch_posts.md:199:- **جاهزية نظام حماية البيانات الشخصية (PDPL).** لكل بيان جواز مصدر: من يملكه، أساس استخدامه النظامي، هل يحتوي بيانات شخصية، ومدة الاحتفاظ. هذا يجعل الإجابة على أسئلة الخصوصية مسألة سجلّ، لا تخمين.
.\docs\commercial\launch_kit\01_linkedin_launch_posts.md:214:In Saudi Arabia, revenue tools are no longer judged by speed alone, but by whether they survive procurement, legal, and security review.
.\docs\commercial\launch_kit\01_linkedin_launch_posts.md:218:- **PDPL readiness.** Every datum has a source passport: who owns it, its lawful basis for use, whether it contains personal data, and its retention window. This turns privacy questions into a matter of record, not guesswork.
.\docs\commercial\launch_kit\01_linkedin_launch_posts.md:220:- **Approval-first on every external action.** No automated cold messages, no sending on your behalf without your approval. This protects your account and your reputation together.
